creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: 128GB also works on 13.0-RELEASE. Although I noticed that it only works when directly connected to USB port, I had problems when attaching over USB 3.0 HUB, disk was detected in dmesg then /dev/da0 was not showing up, but that problem seems to be fixed on 13-STABLE now, so it should also show up in the release soon, thank you! :-)
